verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I see you lying in. This desert dry and parched. . Is just a passing test. You need to realise, for God to use your life He has to bring you out, remake you again Be still I say my friend, be sure that everything Will work out for your good.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am not a stranger to this valley I've walked this road before I've stumbled on these rocks, I've fallen on my face But I stood right up again. It's not the strength I own, but the strength I have in Christ I'll pray for you my friend, I'll lend a helping hand We'll make it home together.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Elijah had his wilderness, Moses ran to Midian Israel had to roam 40 years to pass her test. Jesus overcame temptation after 40 days and nights Yet He was the very life of God. I say again my friend, be still and wait on God. You'll come out as pure Gold"
